data.body:
GAP FINDING (from implementation plan gap analysis): T1 .test-index amendment for reviewer-delta-light.md.

reviewer-delta-light.md already has an existing .test-index entry pointing to test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh:
  plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md:tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh

T1 must NOT add a new standalone line for reviewer-delta-light.md. Instead, APPEND the new test to the existing line (comma-separated):
  plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-light.md:tests/docs/test-reviewer-polyglot-compliance.sh,tests/docs/test-reviewer-blindspot-annotations.sh

The other 4 delta files (deep-hygiene, deep-correctness, deep-arch, standard) have no existing entries — add new lines for those.

Also: T1 tests should use real delta/base source files (from the repo) via build-review-agents.sh --output TMPDIR — NOT fixture files. This ensures the RED phase tests fail against the actual unmodified codebase.
